prompt:
Goal: Create a sleek luxury beverage campaign poster for Starbucks Caramel Frappuccino, designed for viral Instagram and Pinterest, with an urban coffeehouse atmosphere and contemporary premium branding.

Canvas: Vertical portrait poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, high-resolution advertising layout. Use a dark espresso-brown and black background with warm amber bokeh lights, caramel glow, glossy reflections, floating coffee beans, ice cubes, and dynamic caramel splashes around the drink.

Main visual: Place a large Starbucks-style caramel frappuccino cup on the right side as the hero object. The clear plastic cup is filled with blended caramel coffee, condensation droplets, caramel streaks down the inside and outside, a domed transparent lid, a green straw angled upward, and a tall swirl of whipped cream covered in glossy caramel drizzle. Add a green circular siren-style logo on the cup. Make the drink look rich, creamy, chilled, luxurious, and irresistible.

Top typography: At the upper left, add small uppercase text “STARBUCKS” with a tiny star divider beneath it. Below, set the word “Caramel” very large in elegant golden serif lettering. Under it, set “Frappuccino” in oversized white handwritten script. Add the tagline exactly: “smooth • chilled • iconic”. Use refined gold and white typography with premium spacing.

Luxury badge: Add 1 circular seal near the upper right reading “MADE TO INDULGE” and “MADE FOR YOU” around a central gold star.

Premium ingredients panel: On the left-center, create a rounded rectangular dark glass panel titled “PREMIUM INGREDIENTS”. Inside it, show exactly 6 ingredient tiles in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each with a small realistic product image, a simple white icon, and label: 1) ESPRESSO, shown as a small glass cup of espresso; 2) CARAMEL SAUCE, shown as a bowl of caramel with caramel cubes; 3) MILK, shown as a glass bottle and small cup; 4) WHIPPED CREAM, shown as a white cream swirl in a bowl; 5) ICE, shown as clear ice cubes in a bowl; 6) COFFEE BEANS, shown as roasted beans in a bowl.

Crafting steps section: Across the lower middle, add a horizontal process strip titled “CRAFTED TO PERFECTION”. Include exactly 5 numbered step cards connected by small arrows and dotted guide lines. Each card has a photo-like miniature scene and a label: 1) “BREW RICH ESPRESSO SHOT” with espresso pouring into a glass; 2) “BLEND COFFEE WITH ICE & MILK” with ice and milk in a blender cup; 3) “ADD CARAMEL FOR SWEETNESS” with caramel pouring over ice; 4) “TOP WITH WHIPPED CREAM” with whipped cream being added; 5) “FINISH WITH CARAMEL DRIZZLE” with the completed frappuccino. Add small matching icons below the cards.

Bottom information boxes: Add exactly 2 rounded rectangular callout boxes. Bottom left box title: “BARISTA TIP”, with a whisk icon and text: “Blend with extra ice for a thicker café-style texture”. Bottom right box title: “MAKE IT YOURS”, with text: “Customize your sweetness” and the options “Light • Regular • Extra”, plus a divider line and text: “Add an extra shot for a bolder kick”. Between the boxes, place a smaller close-up image of the caramel whipped topping.

Footer: At the bottom center, add spaced uppercase text “CHILLED. CREAMY. ICONIC.” and a handwritten line: “Made for caramel lovers.” followed by a small heart.

Visual style: Premium cinematic beverage advertising, dark luxury coffee palette, caramel-gold highlights, creamy whites, realistic product photography mixed with clean infographic layout, crisp readable labels, glossy surfaces, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, high contrast, elegant editorial composition.

Constraints: Use exactly 6 ingredient tiles, exactly 5 process steps, exactly 2 bottom callout boxes, and exactly 1 circular luxury seal. Keep all visible text sharp and correctly spelled. Do not add extra logos, extra ingredient tiles, extra process cards, watermark, QR code, or unrelated products.
